name: improve-codebase-health
description: Codebase health review plugin grounded in classic software engineering books — scoped health scoring, architecture-depth findings, ambiguity diagnostics, safety tiers, and weekly steward workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Book-grounded codebase health reviews for AI-assisted engineering
interface.longDescription: Codebase health review plugin grounded in classic software engineering books. Produces scoped health scores, architecture-depth findings, ambiguity diagnostics, safety tiers, and weekly steward workflows so humans and coding agents can keep systems safe to change.
